feed.title: SAP Community - SAP HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAP CAP, HDI and Datasphere
entry.content:
Hello collegues,

For a customer we are developing a SAP CAP application with Hana capabilities. Before this project I have always used HDI container active on the same subaccount to connect CAP with Hana.

But now, we have two subaccounts:

  • Development: we develop SAPUI5 and CAP applications. HDI container service is not active.
  • Datasphere: we have the Datasphere service active and instance running.

We need to connect CAP application with Datasphere. I have asked to active HDI container service in Development subaccount but the manager rejected it.

So, my question is... is it possible to connect from CAP to Datasphere without HDI container in Development subaccount?

If the answer is yet, is it right to do and how can be achieved?

Thank you very much in advance Community!!!

BR,

Manuel

entry.title: Generate .xsodata service from .hdbview
entry.content:
I'm on an old HANA system. I need to select data from a table, filtering them and exposing through an .xsodata service. Reading online I got that I need to create an .hdbview view and use it in my .xsodata service. So, my stations.hdbview it's:

schema="SAP_NTV_OPINTSYS";
query="SELECT \"STATIONCODE\" \"NAME\" FROM \"SAP_NTV_OPINTSYS\".\"NAV_STATION\" WHERE \"COUNTRYCODE\" = 'IT' AND \"INACTIVE\" = '0' AND \"STATIONCLASS\" = 'T' ";

and I think it's correct because it shows as activated.

The .xsodata I'm writing it's this:

service {
    "<path_to_the_hdbview>::stations" as "stations" keys ("STATIONCODE", "NAME");
}

but I can't activate it, there is some sort of error I don't get.

Is this the correct syntax?

entry.title: Not able to extend "My Inbox(F0862)" application for Purchase Requisition
entry.content:
Hello SAP Experts,

I’m currently working on extending the standard My Inbox app for Purchase Requisition approvals in S/4HANA 2022. The main requirement is to display a list of approvers in the approval detail screen of the app.

I have followed the steps from these SAP Community blogs:
Fiori My Inbox 2.0 – Extend Approve Purchase Order – S/4HANA 1610
Extend My Inbox 2.0 Purchase Requisition S/4 Hana

What I’ve Done:

  • Extended standard CDS views:
    • C_PurRequisitionFs
    • C_PurRequisitionItemFs
    • Added the required fields and defined @ui annotations like UI.LineItem and UI.Identification
  • Verified that the new fields are available in:
    • OData $metadata
    • Annotations preview (/sap/opu/odata/IWFND/catalogservice;v=2/Annotations(TechnicalName='C_PURREQUISITION_FS_ANNO_MDL',Version='0001')/$value)

Issue:

Although the fields appear correctly in the metadata and annotation files, they are not displayed in the UI of the My Inbox app(Purchase Requisition Approval).

What I’ve Verified:

  • CDS annotations are correctly defined
  • OData metadata is refreshed and active

Question:

Has anyone implemented a similar approver list extension for this scenario successfully?

Any suggestions or shared experiences would be greatly appreciated.
Thank you!

entry.title: Missing tab in SOAMANAGER
entry.content:
Hi Experts!

We're currently activating our Inbound for EDI, and while we run the SOAMANAGER, we didn't see the "Application and Scenario Communcation Tab". 

Is there any updates or changes for this tab name in SOAMANAGER? or is there a guide to add this tab via authorization in SU01 to be visible this in SOAMANAGER?

BTW, currently we're using S4 HANA Private Cloud Edition 2020.

Thank you in advance!
-Jaspher

entry.title: SAP HANA Backup to tape with Veeam-Plug-In
entry.content:
Sehr geehrte Damen und PERSON_NAME,

 

wir möchten unsere SAP HANA-DB künftig über die Backint-Schnittstelle und dem Veeam-Plug-In für SAP HANA sichern.
Für unser Test-System wurde der Prozess mittlerweile auch schon eingerichtet und funktioniert auch problemlos.

 

Aktuell wird das Backup über einen backup-Job in das lokale Veeam-Repository auf dem Backup-Server geschrieben.
Wir möchten das Backup künftig in einem zweiten Step jedoch auch noch auf ein Tape speichern.

 

Hierfür stehen gem. unseren Informationen folgende Optionen zu Verfügung: 

 

(1) Files to tape

 

(2) Backups to tape:

 

Da man hier die SAP-Backup-Jobs aber nicht auswählen kann, müsste man sich in der Job-Konfiguration für Variante „Backup Repositories“ auswählen. Dies setzt dann voraus, dass man die SAP HANA Jobs auf ein separates Repository laufen lässt und nur dieses sichert.

 

Können Sie uns sagen, welche Option gem. SAP die bessere wäre?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: System copy using SWPM Refresh or Move Database Instance(Online DB backup)
entry.content:
Hello All,

We are performing System copy using SWPM Refresh or Move Database Instance(Online Production DB backup). SWPM got struck due to Online DB backup not available in a backup location. so i have stopped the SWPM.

I have triggered SWPM again to continue with new run but error received in SWPM. Can you please advise how to fix the issue?

Log: instdir/HdbCmdOut.log

Sat Jun 14 11:11:45 CEST 2025 | com.sap.hdb.sl.lib.connection.sql.JdbcConnection | Start new connection with connect URL: jdbc:sap://xxxxhostname:30013/?databaseName=PQ2 connect user: SYSTEM
Sat Jun 14 11:11:47 CEST 2025 | com.sap.hdb.sl.lib.utils.cmd.clazz.IsConnectPossible | HDBSLLIB Exception: [CONNECTION_REFUSED] com.sap.db.jdbc.exceptions.JDBCDriverException: SAP DBTech JDBC: Cannot connect to jdbc:sap://xxxxhostname:30013/ [Cannot connect to host /10.10.10.108:30015 [java.io.IOException: The remote computer refused the network connection.
], -813.: (uninitialized) -> 10.10.10.108:30015 ConnectionID:0 SessionID:0].
Sat Jun 14 11:11:47 CEST 2025 | com.sap.hdb.core.main.cmd.HdbCmdMain | End of HdbCmdClazz section: class com.sap.hdb.sl.lib.utils.cmd.clazz.IsConnectPossible
Sat Jun 14 11:11:47 CEST 2025 | com.sap.hdb.core.main.cmd.HdbCmdMain | *************************************************************

R3trans -d result:

4 ETW000 R3trans version 6.26 (release 777 - 17.12.24 - 14:40:42).
4 ETW000 unicode enabled version
4 ETW000 ===============================================

4 ETW000 date&time : 14.06.2025 - 13:04:58

4 ETW000 R3trans was called as follows: R3trans -dx
4 ETW000 trace at level 1 opened for a given file pointer
4 ETW000 [ dev trc,00000] Sat Jun 14 13:04:58 2025
4 ETW000 [ dev trc,00000] Loading DB library 'dbhdbslib.dll' ...

4 ETW000 [ dev trc,00000] Version of 'dbhdbslib.dll' is "777.05", patchlevel (0.722)
4 ETW000 [ dev trc,00000] DBHDBSLIB : version 777.05, patch 0.722 (Make PL 0.722)
4 ETW000 [ dev trc,00000] HDB shared library (dbhdbslib) patchlevels (last 10)
4 ETW000 [ dev trc,00000] (0.722) M_ES_TABLES does not exist in HANA cloud (note 3550050)

entry.title: Using HANA SQL Tabular Function in SQL Join
entry.content:
Hi,

I have a tabular function defined in SQL as:

The function works fine when I test it using SQL:

However I cannot work out the syntax for using the tabular function in a SQL join.

Is it even possible to use a tabular function in a HANA SQL join statement? (not a calculation view)

entry.title: How to Integrate Primavera P6 Activities into SAP PS Using SAP CPI?
entry.content:
Hi Community,

I’ve recently received a requirement from my client to integrate Primavera P6 schedules/activities into SAP Project System (SAP PS) using SAP Cloud Platform Integration (CPI).

This is a new scenario for me, and I haven’t worked on Primavera integrations before. The goal is to transfer WBS elements, network activities, and dates from Primavera P6 into SAP PS, so that project planning and execution can stay in sync.

Any guidance, example iFlows, mappings, or relevant blog links would be highly appreciated!

entry.title: Restrict Raw Material Batch transfer into storage location
entry.content:
Hi,

I would like to restrict transfers into a storage location for raw material transfer because it is using for HALB materials.

Is it possible?

Thank you.

entry.title: FAIL: process hdbdaemon HDB Daemon not running
entry.content:
Hi,

We have HANA 2.0 running on 2 node cluster (Pacemaker).. 

The HANA database on node 2 is down and when i try to start it, it gives me below error 

FAIL: process hdbdaemon HDB Daemon not running

I tried many solutions like removing the locks files, changing the permission etc.. but it didnt resovle

Please suggest

Thanks

bilal

entry.title: Batch replication stuck in SMQ2
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

The following error occurs in the ERP system (S/4HANA), which is connected to a decentralized EWM system on S/4HANA (02/10/2024 FPS):

When I create a batch in the inbound delivery in the decentralized EWM system, the batch is replicated to the ERP system but sometimes gets stuck in SMQ2 with the error message: "Object does not exist."
Function module is /SPE/BATCH_SAVE_REPLICA.

This issue happens from time to time — most of the time, batch replication works fine. I am currently investigating the reason why the system occasionally throws this error.

entry.title: Alation HANA DB Connector in violation of HANA Runtime License
entry.content:
Alation is a market leader in the Data Catalog space.  They show up in any kind of web research with BW, ECC, and other SAP connectors.  All of those connectors are really the same, an ODBC Connection to the HANA Database.  

As DBA's we know that metadata scans at the HANA level will bear no real fruit.  We should also know, that the Runtime License for S/4HANA does not allow ODBC connections by third parties.  In a nutshell, there appears to be no real support for S/4HANA to be connected to Alation.

If your company is assessing Alation, be very specific in your challenges on whether they work with SAP.  

That said, does anyone know if the Data Catalog in Datasphere will be a connector of any type to Third Party solutions like Collibra, or Alation?

entry.title: Need Help Querying C203 (Display Master Recipe) – Recipe, Operations, Components, Scrap Data
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

I'm working with SAP Transaction Code C203 – Display Master Recipe and trying to extract detailed recipe data using the appropriate tables that have been ingested into GCP.  For each structure, please use only valid tables and joins 

I need help constructing either a single query or a set of split queries to pull this data efficiently. I'm especially struggling with component scrap data and how to cleanly join the related tables (e.g., MRP4 view from MARC).

🔍 Requirements:

I want to pull the following data with the filtering criteria listed below.

✅ General Filters:

  • PLKO.PLNTY = '2' (Task List Type)

  • PLKO.LOEKZ IS NULL

  • PLKO.VALID_TO = '9999-12-31'

  • PLKO.DATUV <= CURRENT_DATE

  • PLPO.PLNTY = '2'

  • PLPO.LOEKZ IS NULL

  • PLPO.DATUV <= CURRENT_DATE

📘 Recipe Header (PLKO):

  • Recipe Group: PLKO-PLNNR

  • Recipe: PLKO-PLNAL

  • Recipe Description: PLKO-KTEXT

  • Plant: PLKO-WERKS

  • Deletion Flag: PLKO-DELKZ

📘 Assignment:

  • Usage: PLKO-VERWE

  • Resource Network: RC68H-NNAME or CRHD-ARBPL

  • Operation Unit: PLKO-MEINH

⚙️ Operations (PLPO):

  • Operation Number: PLPO-VORNR

  • Superior Operation: PLPO-PVZNR

  • Control Recipe Dest.: PLPO-PHSEQ

  • Control Key: PLPO-STEUS

  • Description: PLPO-LTXA1

  • Base Qty: PLPO-BMSCH (only where STEUS = PI05)

  • UoM: PLPO-MEINH

  • Crewing: PLPO-VGW03 (only where STEUS = PI05)

🧩 Component Assignments:

  • Component Material: STPOB-IDNRK

  • Operation Number: RCM01-VORNR

  • Component Qty: STPOB-MENGE

  • Component UoM: STPOB-MEINS

  • Description: RC27M-MAKTX

  • BOM Item No.: STPOB-POSNR

  • Item Category: STPOB-POSTP

  • BOM Number: STPOB-STLNR

  • Primary Material: PLMZD-BOMAT

  • Alt BOM: PLMZD-STLAL

  • Change Number: PLMZD-AENNR

  • Valid From: PLMZD-DATUV

🔄 Scrap Data (MRP4):

  • Component Scrap: MARC-KAUSF

❓My Questions:

  1. Would it be better to extract this data in one complex query or break it up (e.g., recipe header, operations, components, scrap) and join externally (e.g., in GCP or Power BI)?

  2. How do I cleanly link component scrap from MARC to the rest of the master recipe structure?

Thank you so much in advance. If you’ve built similar queries or reports out of C203 recipe data, any examples or tips would be hugely appreciated

entry.title: Example of a HANA Hierarchy Query for Incentive Management Positions
entry.content:
I'm trying to create a HANA query that takes the highest position and generates a hierarchy tree based on the Incentive Management TrueComp CS_POSITION table.
I've tried a couple of different ways according to what I've read in the SAP_HANA_Hierarchy_Developer_Guide but can't get them to work.
Does anyone happen to have an example of what I'm looking for?

Thanks in advance!
Ron

entry.title: Intermittent Initial Load Slowness for Random T-Codes Affecting Random Users
entry.content:
Dear SAP BASIS/HANA Experts,

In our S/4 HANA production environment, we are encountering intermittent initial load slowness for various transaction codes (T-codes), affecting different users on a random basis. The issue occurs when a user executes a T-code for the first time during the day. Subsequent executions generally respond promptly. However, the issue may reoccur for the same or different users with different T-codes on the following days.

Our observations and findings are as follows:

  • The behavior is unpredictable, affecting random users and random T-codes.

  • The slowness is temporary, typically lasting 30–40 seconds, occasionally up to 1–2 minutes.

  • By the time the issue is reported, it has usually resolved, making it difficult to activate traces or collect dumps.

  • Analysis of STAD data reveals very high DB request times (sequential reads) during slowness against the affected user.

  • Affected users appear to be stuck in the “DYNPLOAD” action, as observed in SM50.

  • Program, screen buffer, table buffer parameters value are sufficient in ST02, No SWAP.

System Environment:

  • Standard architecture: S/4 application and HANA database hosted on the same server

  • Total RAM: 2 TB

  • HANA Memory Allocation Limit: 1600 GB

  • SAP Application Memory: 180 GB

  • Recent upgrade from 1.5 TB to 2 TB RAM completed prior to issue onset

We would appreciate your inputs and recommendations on how best to diagnose and address this behavior, particularly given the inconsistency and unpredictable nature of the symptoms.

Looking forward to your expert guidance.

entry.title: What's the future of SAP technical consultant?
entry.content:
With the introduction of next-generation technologies like SAP BTP, ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model (RAP), SAP Build (LCNC tools), and SAP Joule (AI), it's clear that SAP is moving towards a clean core, cloud-based future.

However, in reality, many organizations are still operating on legacy ABAP systems, and real-world adoption of these new tools remains limited. With the end of ECC support by 2027, this gap raises some concerns.

❓Key Questions:

1. What is the realistic future for SAP technical consultants in this evolving landscape?

2. Is it practical to invest time in RAP, BTP, or AI tools, given the current slow adoption?

3. Are any real projects or clients actively implementing these technologies?

Would appreciate insights from those currently working on RAP or BTP-based projects or involved in modern SAP implementations.

Thank you!

entry.title: S4HANA LTMC
entry.content:
Hello All,

I am trying to upload the General Data for a few customers and have chosen the BP grouping as Z001 which is internal number range.

The KUNNR field for On-Prem has been set to Visible from required in the appropriate Migration Object in Change View of Source Structure.

After the Upload file process and Data Transfer process I am getting the error attached .

Please find attached the file and the snapshot of the error .

Can someone please guide me and let me know what is going wrong.

Regards.

SM

entry.title: Is there a SAP Module that is able to maintain lab equipment outside the plant maintenance area?
entry.content: We are looking for a way to maintain quality lab equipment, calibrations etc that is not planned/maintained by a Maintenance Planner.  Meaning the Quality Associates would need to plan when service vendors arrive on site to calibrate scales specifically located in their lab area.  How is this area maintained if Plant Maintenance will not pick up that work?  thank you,

entry.title: When running the Simplification Item Check, a consistency check result error appears as shown below.
entry.content:
When running the Simplification Item Check, a consistency check result error appears as shown below. How can we resolve this and proceed? Screenshots are attached.

Check Sub-ID:"DO_SDMI_CHECK->CL_NGC_CORE_SDM_MSEHI_CABN", return code = 12 .
The SDMI (Silent Data Migration) CL_NGC_CORE_SDM_MSEHI_CABN is still initial in client
000. There are 11  relevant entries still to be migrated.
Error: The SDMI CL_NGC_CORE_SDM_MSEHI_CABN is not uptime-capable on the next target
release.
Therefore the SDMI must finish before the upgrade in all clients mentioned above.
The SDMI is registered for S4CORE, current version: 105  , last_uptime_release: 106  .
Target release:108
Explanation "Initial": If the status remains "Initial" over a long time (days) then this
means that there might be a problem with the background job for SDMI execution.
You can check the logs for possible issues (SDM-MON -> Display application log). Normally
the SDMIs should either go to status F (finished) or N (not relevant).
For questions please open a message to the component of the SDMI class CA-CL.
The following select statement can be used to see the relevant data for migration: (check
in correct client)
SELECT * FROM PSDMMSEHICABN WHERE SDM_STATUS < '02'

entry.title: How to Configure QS41 & QS51: Steps for Opening Customizing Views in Different Systems
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

I’d like to share a quick guide based on a recent configuration we performed to open QS41 and QS51 for customizing in different systems (Development, Quality, and Production). This can help those facing restrictions while accessing QS41/QS51 catalog maintenance across landscapes.

🔧For Development & Quality Systems

SAP Note: 356483

To open the configuration of QS41/QS51, follow these steps:

  1. Execute transaction SE54.

  2. Enter the following customizing objects one by one:

    • V_QPGR_KAT

    • V_QPCD_KAT

    • V_QPAC_KAT

    • V_QPAM_KAT

i. Choose "Generated Objects".

ii. Click on "Create/Change".

iii. On the Generation Environment screen, scroll to the "Dialog Data Transport Details" block at the bottom.

iv. Select "No, or user, recording routine".

v. Save your changes and capture in TR.

⚠️Important: Do not transport these changes to the production system. These settings are system-specific and must be applied only where necessary (i.e., Dev or QA).

🏭For Production System

SAP Note: 736920

  1. Execute transaction SOBJ.

  2. Choose the 'Enter Conditions' indicator.

  3. Click 'Maintain'.

i. Specify and update the following objects one by one:

V_QPAM_CL

V_QPGR_CL

ii. Set the indicator 'Current Settings'.

iii. Save the changes and capture in TR.

Follow the same procedure in the Development system, create the Transport Request (TR), and then move the TR to Quality and Production.

✅Summary:

This setup ensures QS41/QS51 catalog maintenance is accessible and editable where required without compromising system integrity. 

Let me know if you’ve used alternate approaches or encountered specific scenarios during implementation. Your inputs are most welcome!

Best regards,
Binod Kumar
